name: Irish Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: All-Bran cereal, oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and caraway seeds.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the sugar, vegetable oil, and buttermilk until well combined.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan with additional vegetable oil.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45-60 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and slicing.
